character_backstory: They grew up in a coastal fishing village, where early hardship shaped how they see the world. It was not an easy start, but it taught them resilience.
character_evolution: Over time they left a mining town behind and grew into someone stronger, learning to trust themselves and lead others through difficulty.
ideal_home: My ideal home is near a valley homestead, simple and calm, with room for people I love to gather.
background: I grew up in a small mountain town, and it shaped a lot of how I approach things now, for better and worse.
current_challenges: Lately I have been dealing with trouble sleeping and stress.
ten_year_outlook: In ten years I picture myself traveled extensively and living somewhere new.
